document.source_title: Gujarat Titans: How team built on Test instincts dismantling IPL’s T20 template

claims.claim_text: Titans have torn against the zeitgeisty patterns of the league.
claims.evidence_text: Titans have torn against the zeitgeisty patterns patterns of the league.

claims.claim_text: Titans have taken 61 wickets, while the rest have managed only 23.
claims.evidence_text: Together, they have taken 61 wickets — the rest have managed only 23.

claims.claim_text: Titans are among the top two and title frontrunners.
claims.evidence_text: Yet, in a glorious paradox, they are where every side wants to be. Among the top two, effectively in the play-offs, and title frontrunners.

entities.name: Gujarat Titans
entities.description: A cricket team that has adopted a unique strategy in the IPL.
entities.evidence_text: Titans have torn against the zeitgeisty patterns patterns of the league.

entities.name: Ashish Nehra
entities.description: Head coach of Gujarat Titans, known for his seam bowling expertise.
entities.evidence_text: The design, perhaps, owed to their head coach, Ashish Nehra, a lethal exponent of seam bowling.

entities.name: Kagiso Rabada
entities.description: A key bowler for Gujarat Titans, known for his pace and bounce.
entities.evidence_text: Rabada, of lithe limbs and graceful explosiveness, seams and skids the ball at high pace.

entities.name: Mohammed Siraj
entities.description: A bowler for Gujarat Titans, known for his swing and seam.
entities.evidence_text: Siraj, exuding vigorous energy, invariably swings and seams the ball.

entities.name: Jason Holder
entities.description: A bowler for Gujarat Titans, known for his height and bounce.
entities.evidence_text: Holder, lumbering to the crease, has one of the highest release points in the world.

entities.name: Prasidh Krishna
entities.description: A bowler for Gujarat Titans, known for his speed.
entities.evidence_text: The similarly gangly Prasidh doesn’t purchase as much movement as Holder, but is quicker.

entities.name: Rashid Khan
entities.description: A leg-spinner for Gujarat Titans, known for his wicket-taking ability.
entities.evidence_text: Holder is the middle-over enforcer, alongside leg-spinner Rashid Khan, who has stealthily picked up 16 wickets.

entities.name: Sai Sudharsan
entities.description: A batsman for Gujarat Titans, known for his ability to anchor innings.
entities.evidence_text: Sudharsan has been dutifully playing that role.

entities.name: Shubman Gill
entities.description: A batsman for Gujarat Titans, known for his flexible batting style.
entities.evidence_text: Gill could match Abhishek’s strike rate on a belter, but Abhishek cannot anchor like Gill or Sudharsan.

metrics.name: Wickets Taken
metrics.evidence_text: Together, they have taken 61 wickets — the rest have managed only 23.

metrics.name: Strike Rate of Rabada and Siraj
metrics.evidence_text: Their combined stats read 21 wickets at a strike rate of 14.85.

metrics.name: Economy Rate of Rabada and Siraj
metrics.evidence_text: Their combined stats read ... economy rate of 7.42.
